Class MarketDTO

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.DTOs.MarketDTO
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MarketDTO extends Object implements Serializable
Data-transfer object for the market state, carrying the top and bottom card rows and the top and bottom building rows.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MarketDTO(List<CardDTO> topCards, List<CardDTO> bottomCards, List<BuildingDTO> topBuildings, List<BuildingDTO> bottomBuildings)
    Creates a MarketDTO with the given row contents.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<BuildingDTO>
    getBottomBuildings()
    Returns the buildings in the bottom row of the market.

    Returns the cards in the bottom row of the market.
    List<BuildingDTO>
    getTopBuildings()
    Returns the buildings in the top row of the market.

    Returns the cards in the top row of the market.

    Replaces the bottom-row building list.

  • Constructor Details

    • MarketDTO

      public MarketDTO(List<CardDTO> topCards, List<CardDTO> bottomCards, List<BuildingDTO> topBuildings, List<BuildingDTO> bottomBuildings)
      Creates a MarketDTO with the given row contents.
      Parameters:
      topCards - cards in the top row of the market.
      bottomCards - cards in the bottom row of the market.
      topBuildings - buildings in the top row of the market.
      bottomBuildings - buildings in the bottom row of the market.

  • Method Details

    • getTopCards

      public List<CardDTO> getTopCards()
      Returns the cards in the top row of the market.
      Returns:
      the top card row.

    • getBottomCards

      public List<CardDTO> getBottomCards()
      Returns the cards in the bottom row of the market.
      Returns:
      the bottom card row.

    • getTopBuildings

      public List<BuildingDTO> getTopBuildings()
      Returns the buildings in the top row of the market.
      Returns:
      the top building row.

    • getBottomBuildings

      public List<BuildingDTO> getBottomBuildings()
      Returns the buildings in the bottom row of the market.
      Returns:
      the bottom building row.

    • setTopCards

      public void setTopCards(List<CardDTO> topCards)
      Replaces the top-row card list.
      Parameters:
      topCards - the new top-row card list.

    • setBottomCards

      public void setBottomCards(List<CardDTO> bottomCards)
      Replaces the bottom-row card list.
      Parameters:
      bottomCards - the new bottom-row card list.
